# NVIDIA Content Agents

AI-powered agents for OpenUSD/USD content workflows: material assignment,
physics property classification, texture generation, and validation.

## Canonical Entry Points

- User README: `README.md`
- Agent guide: `AGENTS.md`
- Claude Code guide: `CLAUDE.md`
- Material Agent CLI docs: `apps/material_agent/README.md`
- Physics Agent CLI docs: `apps/physics_agent/README.md`
- Texture Agent CLI docs: `apps/texture_agent/README.md`
- Validation Agent CLI docs (Research Preview):
  `apps/validation_agent/README.md`
- Validation Agent examples (Research Preview):
  `apps/validation_agent/examples/README.md`
- Material Agent API docs: `apps/material_agent/docs/api.md`
- Physics Agent API docs: `apps/physics_agent/docs/api.md`
- Texture Agent REST API docs: `apps/texture_agent_service/docs/api.md`

## Bundled Agent Skills

- Canonical skill tree: `.agents/skills/`
- Codex skill mirror: `.codex/skills/`
- Claude Code skill mirror: `.claude/skills/`
- Material first-run skills: `.agents/skills/material-agent-cli/SKILL.md`,
  `.codex/skills/material-agent-cli/SKILL.md`,
  `.claude/skills/material-agent-cli/SKILL.md`
- Physics first-run skills: `.agents/skills/physics-agent-cli/SKILL.md`,
  `.codex/skills/physics-agent-cli/SKILL.md`,
  `.claude/skills/physics-agent-cli/SKILL.md`
- Texture first-run skills: `.agents/skills/texture-agent-cli/SKILL.md`,
  `.codex/skills/texture-agent-cli/SKILL.md`,
  `.claude/skills/texture-agent-cli/SKILL.md`
- Validation first-run skills (Research Preview):
  `.agents/skills/validation-agent-cli/SKILL.md`,
  `.codex/skills/validation-agent-cli/SKILL.md`,
  `.claude/skills/validation-agent-cli/SKILL.md`

## First Commands

```bash
material-agent run apps/material_agent/configs/unified_example.yaml --dry-run
material-agent run apps/material_agent/configs/unified_example.yaml
physics-agent run apps/physics_agent/configs/lightbulb.yaml
texture-agent run apps/texture_agent/configs/texture_example.yaml
validation-agent run apps/validation_agent/examples/configs/steel_scaffold_behavior_refine_summary.yaml
```

Keep API keys in `.env` and do not print or commit secrets.
